headline: How Camp Dream GA handles information
subheadline: This policy explains what information we collect, how it is used, and how advertising, analytics, and inquiry flows are handled across the site.

sections.title: Information we collect
sections.description: We may collect information you provide through forms, booking requests, newsletter signups, and normal analytics signals such as page views and referral data.

sections.title: How we use information
sections.description: We use information to respond to inquiries, improve the site experience, understand which content performs well, and support booking or planning follow-up.

sections.title: Advertising and analytics
sections.description: Some content pages may include advertising in the future. Analytics and advertising providers may use cookies or similar technologies to measure performance and personalize relevant experiences where allowed.

sections.title: Your choices
sections.description: If you need to update or remove information you have submitted through a form, contact the site team and reference the inquiry details you provided.

faq.question: Does Camp Dream GA sell personal data?
faq.answer: The site is designed to use visitor data for site operations, analytics, advertising support, and inquiry follow-up, not to operate as a personal-data marketplace.
